description: Fetch one company's full record by country code and registration number, legal name, status, entity type, incorporation date, registry source, and any officers held.

labels.name: get_company_procurement
labels.description: List the government procurement contracts a company has won (from open-contracting data): the awarding body, contract title, value and date. Strong signal of what a company actually does.

labels.name: screen_sanctions
labels.description: Screen a company or person name against the OFAC SDN, OFAC Consolidated and UN Security Council lists. Returns any matches with a name-match confidence.
